PROP-baseauction-inv-023.text: Bidder-controlled callback data must not enable state manipulation between transfer-out and pull-in.
PROP-baseauction-inv-023.assertion: forall bid with data: auctionCallback(data) executes in locked state (s_entered==true)

locations.note: auctionCallback invoked at line 449 while s_entered==true; data is bidder-controlled
